title: ononis minutissima f. saxatilis
intro: Ononis minutissima f. saxatilis is a subspecies of the tiny burnet, a flowering plant that belongs to the legume family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Ononis minutissima f. saxatilis include its potential to treat various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues due to its diuretic and expectorant properties. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often combined with other herbs to enhance their medicinal effects.
